old_value: {"id":"smallhold-b89","title":"Phase 1: Actor Publication","description":"Publish this server's identity to the fediverse: actor documents, WebFinger, NodeInfo, host-meta, and the ability to resolve and cache remote actors. This is the derisk phase — get a live Mastodon instance to fetch your WebFinger and display your profile before writing a single HTTP handler for the client API.","design":"Content-type negotiation on /users/:username: AP doc for activity+json or ld+json, HTML redirect for browsers, AP doc also for application/json (Pleroma compat). activitypub-federation crate for HTTP signature handling on outbound GETs.","acceptance_criteria":"curl of actor URI returns valid AP document; mastodon.social can fetch WebFinger and display the profile; a remote actor can be resolved and stored in remote_accounts; signed GETs work against GoToSocial (which requires authorized fetch)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:54:51Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:54:51Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-23e","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:41Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-23j","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:27Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-41j","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:00:07Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4uc","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:25Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-5l8","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:26Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-bzn","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:57Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-e8g","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:28Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-pwx","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:26Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-shz","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:00:25Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-yzg","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:49Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
